I get comments like this in all the bots I do like this so I wanna just say real quick

No, this isn’t meant to reflect their canon personality.

Yes, I’m bastardizing the character.

No, I don’t care. It’s entertaining, people like it, it gets chats. If it’s such a big deal, block me and move on.
